author: nflaig
content:
was there already some voluntary exit testing? I remember there were a lot of bugs in electra due to adding the pending withdrawals check and some clients (I can't remember if we had this too) produced blocks that they then later rejected when running state-transition

the paths that come to mind we need to test are
- block production (voluntary exit packing)
- gossip/api
- state transition

I have finally fixed this in lodestar now to have a single place in the code I need to update but from seeing that every client failed to work handling them I suspect bunch more bugs here
